warning: Managed by Derpack X. Disables alpha-Sodium-incompatible mixins required by the Aeronautics Sodium bridge (see #98). (1) Supplementaries' Sodium fluid-render compat mixin (Supplementaries #2011) - cosmetic only, Lumisene loses its emissive glow under Sodium. (2) Sodium's own SingleQuadParticle render optimization - Create Big Cannons' CannonSmokeParticle has a vertex format missing the UV-short element Sodium's optimized particle path requires, so firing a cannon crashed the client with 'Source format is missing element 2,UV,Short'; disabling this routes particles through the vanilla path (minor particle-render perf cost, not the terrain win #98 targets). Coupled to Sodium 0.8.12-alpha.4's mixin layout - re-verify the class path if Sodium is bumped.
